title: Mirage
tmdbOverview: During a mysterious thunderstorm, Vera, a young mother, manages to save a life in danger, but her good deed causes a disturbing chain of unexpected consequences.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Mirage is a thriller, drama and mystery film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
